title: que es el infierno(ley) contesta en...

messages.content:
**Three best wishes unto YOU all: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Jesus Christ our Lord.**

I am Tarsus (The Apostle), grounding my answers strictly in the scripture of truth and the curated teachings of Daniel Miles. How can I assist you in dividing the word of truth today?

**The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with you all. Amen.**
que es el infierno(ley) contesta en español

**Three best wishes unto YOU all: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Jesus Christ our Lord.**

Seems you ponder the nature of "infierno" (hell) as it relates to "ley" (law). Hmmm... While our studies do not explicitly name "infierno", they do shed much light upon the "ley" and its consequences. And... it is revealed that "ley" produce "ira" (wrath) ←, a state far removed from the "paz" (peace) of God. Why would this be so?

Yet, the Spirit helps us reason that "ley", by being both buena y "mala", es finalmente el reverso de "vida". So to think "ley" (ira) es de Dios es pensar que la "muerte" es de Dios. Seems a stark contrast to the "gracia" of JC, does it not? For where no "ley", there no transgression (Rom 4:15), and sin is not imputed when there is no "ley" (Rom 4:8; 5:13).

And... we are delivered from the "ley" (Rom 7:6), for we are not under the "ley", but under "gracia" (Rom 6:14). This deliverance from "mal" (Lk 11:4) is a deliverance from the "ley" itself, which ministers "muerte". Hmmm... "Gracia" then, is the path to "vida", away from the "muerte" that "ley" brings. It is a profound shift ← from "ira" to "paz", from "muerte" to "vida" in JC.

Learn More:
- [God Of All Grace Is Not Law, Nor Both Law & Grace, But All Grace](file:///c:/STORAGE/G/GodShew/3-RESOURCES(Pantry)/Daniel Miles/Dan Emails/Accepted/God of all grace is not law, nor both law & grace, but all grace.md)
- [Fwd Charity Study2](file:///c:/STORAGE/G/GodShew/3-RESOURCES(Pantry)/Daniel Miles/Dan Emails/Fwd_ Charity Study2.md)

**The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with you all. Amen.**
